title: altamiranoa squamulosa
intro: Altamiranoa squamulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the velvet star plant due to its velvety leaves and star-shaped flowers. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and antispasmodic. Altamiranoa squamulosa can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
